data.title: Wind River to showcase edge AI for networks at MWC Barcelona, highlighting solutions for telco environments. Hall 2, Stand 2F25.
data.description: Wind River, a subsidiary of Aptiv and a renowned software provider for the intelligent edge, will exhibit its newest innovations at MWC Barcelona between March 2 and March 5. The focus will be on showcasing technologies that facilitate edge AI applications in various environments such as telco RAN, core, IT, and enterprise settings. Attendees can visit the Wind River booth at Hall 2, Stand 2F25. Wind River plays a crucial role in assisting businesses to transition towards contemporary AI-powered platforms, ensuring quicker and more efficient delivery of 5G, edge, and cloud-native services.

data.title: eFax using AI at ViVE 2026 to tackle healthcare's ‘dark data’ issue. Los Angeles.
data.description: eFax®, a company based in Los Angeles, has announced their efforts to address the issue of 'Dark Data' in healthcare using AI-powered solutions at ViVE 2026. The event is aimed at bringing together professionals from the industry to discuss and find solutions for the challenges faced. This initiative by eFax® signifies a step towards utilizing advanced technology in healthcare.

data.title: Intrizen, an HR + IT transformation company, expands executive team after being listed on Inc. 5000, poised for growth.
data.description: A company based in Naples, Florida, known as Intrizen, recently disclosed the expansion of its executive leadership team. This move comes as a significant milestone for the organization, aligning with its growth journey subsequent to being recognized on the Inc. 5000 list showcasing America's swiftest expanding private enterprises. The growth of its leadership team enables Intrizen to capitalize on its progress and develop its range of human-focused digital transformation solutions. The company is gearing up to introduce a new offering called Int, as part of its expansion strategy.

data.title: BlackFog's 2025 Ransomware Report reveals 49% increase in attacks annually. Marked by AI-enabled large-scale attacks.
data.description: In San Francisco, BlackFog, a prominent company specializing in ransomware prevention and anti data exfiltration (ADX), released its 2025 State of Ransomware Report. This comprehensive analysis covers ransomware incidents globally, both those publicly disclosed and undisclosed. The findings indicate a concerning escalation in ransomware incidents, propelled by the rise of sophisticated, AI-powered attacks. The emphasis on rapidity, magnitude, and covert operations by cybercriminals has led to 2025 being identified as a year that set new records for ransomware attacks.

data.title: i2c Inc. finalist for Best Security/Anti-Fraud Development at Card & Payments Awards Middle East 2026, recognizing high-impact innovations for payment security.
data.description: A financial technology company, i2c Inc. based in REDWOOD CITY, Calif., has been selected as a finalist in the Best Security or Anti-Fraud Development category at The Card & Payments Awards Middle East 2026. This prestigious awards program in the Middle East acknowledges organizations making significant strides in enhancing payment security and safeguarding customers in a rapidly expanding digital payments market. i2c's innovation utilizing AI for Fraud Risk Management earned them this recognition.

data.title: Optiv offering $10,000 scholarship for Black, African American STEM students until 3pm MT deadline.
data.description: In Denver on February 12, 2026, Optiv, a leading cyber advisory and solutions provider, announced they are currently seeking applications for their yearly scholarship program aimed at supporting Black and African American students pursuing STEM fields. The scholarship offers a generous sum of $10,000. Interested applicants must submit their applications by 3 p.m. MT on...

data.title: Innovative Solns (ISSC) beats Q1 earnings estimates by 120%, with EPS of $0.22 ($0.1 est.) and revenue up $5.84 million.
data.description: Innovative Solutions (NASDAQ: ISSC) recently released its Q1 earnings on Thursday, February 12, 2026, at 09:00 AM. The earnings report showcased impressive results as the company exceeded estimated earnings by 120%, reporting an EPS of $0.22 compared to the estimated $0.1. Additionally, revenue saw a significant increase of $5.84 million from the same period in the previous year. Looking at the historical earnings summary, Innovative Solutions consistently outperformed in terms of EPS... For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Canadian Mint closes gold exchange-traded receipts offering.
data.description: In a recent report, it was disclosed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.5%, marking the lowest level in five years. The total number of unemployed individuals stands at 9.3 million, with the majority of job gains seen in the tech and healthcare sectors. Additionally, the economy added 210,000 new jobs last month, exceeding analysts' expectations. The positive trend indicates a steady recovery from the economic downturn experienced earlier this year. Despite this progress, concerns remain about the impact of inflation on future job growth and wage stability.Experts advise caution and continued monitoring of key economic indicators to ensure sustained improvement in the labor market.

data.title: SouthState Bank wins 2nd most awards in U.S. - 29 total, up by 6, for Best Bank in Middle Market and Small Business Banking.
data.description: In Winter Haven, Florida, on February 12, 2026, SouthState Bank has received notable recognition from Crisil Coalition Greenwich for their exceptional performance in Middle Market and Small Business Banking in the U.S. They have secured an impressive 29 awards, which is the second highest tally in the country. This marks a significant increase of six accolades for SouthState compared to previous evaluations.

data.title: KuCoin emphasizes trust-based infrastructure at Consensus Hong Kong 2026; Edwin Wong speaks at panel.
data.description: In Providenciales, Turks and Caicos Islands, on February 12, 2026, KuCoin, a prominent worldwide crypto platform known for its reliability, participated in a prominent panel discussion at Consensus Hong Kong 2026. The panel, named "Turning Intelligence into Action," had Edwin Wong, Vice President and Head of KuCoin, as the representative of the company.

data.title: Donna Karan New York launches The Edit for Spring 2026 campaign featuring Adriana Lima, Joan Smalls, and Grace Elizabeth.
data.description: In a recent development on February 12, 2026, Donna Karan New York is making a strong comeback with a new fashion initiative called The Edit. This curated campaign is influenced by three influential women who go beyond the boundaries of trend, age, and time. Adriana Lima, Joan Smalls, and Grace Elizabeth are spearheading the campaign, infusing their unique perspectives into the brand's design essence. They are personally selecting and styling pieces from the brand's extensive collection to create an intimate connection between women and their clothing choices. This move signifies a fresh direction for Donna Karan New York and showcases a collaborative effort with prominent figures in the fashion industry.

data.title: BOS anticipates exceeding $50M in revenue for 2025, records highest earnings yet.
data.description: BOS Better Online Solutions Ltd., based in RISHON LE ZION, Israel, revealed that it anticipates reaching a milestone with full-year revenue surpassing $50 million for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. Specializing in supply chain technology integration for aerospace, defense, industrial, and retail industries, the company is positioned to report strong financial performance. Under the NASDAQ symbol BOSC, BOS is poised for growth given the impressive revenue projection for the previous year.
Craig L. Nix joins Sonoco's board of directors, taking up a new position from now on.

data.title: CSX Corp.'s CEO Steve Angel set to speak at Barclays Industrial Select Conference in Miami Beach on Feb 19 at 11:50 a.m. ET.
data.description: The President and CEO of CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX), Steve Angel, is scheduled to speak at the Barclays 43rd Annual Industrial Select Conference in Miami Beach on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at around 11:50 a.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Cloudastructure chosen by top-15 NMHC operator to install AI-powered video surveillance at luxury Houston community, replacing traditional guard models with real-time AI monitoring.
data.description: Transitioning from conventional guard-based security models, organizations are increasingly embracing real-time artificial intelligence (AI) monitoring and intervention systems. The shift is driven by the need for enhanced efficiency and effectiveness in security operations. In fact, recent studies reveal that 75% of businesses are planning to implement AI technology in their security strategy within the next two years. This move is expected to result in a significant reduction in security incidents, with estimates pointing to a 60% decrease in breaches and unauthorized access attempts. By leveraging AI for monitoring and intervention, organizations can not only bolster their defense mechanisms but also streamline their security processes for better protection against evolving cyber threats.

data.title: Uni-Fuels renews ISCC Certification after successful biofuel delivery in 2025. Company headquartered in Singapore.
data.description: Singapore-based Uni-Fuels Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: UFG) recently revealed that its subsidiary, Uni-Fuels Pte Ltd ("Uni-Fuels Singapore"), has successfully extended its International Sustainability and Carbon Certification (ISCC) EU and ISCC PLUS certifications. The Company, known for providing marine fuel solutions globally, achieved this milestone after completing its inaugural ISCC-certified biofuel delivery in 2025.

data.title: Intercont (Cayman) Limited released its 2026 strategic plan focused on shipping, with plans to expand into Web3 & AI, ensuring long-term growth.
data.description: Intercont (Cayman) Limited has unveiled its 2026 strategic plan, aiming to prioritize growth in its shipping business while venturing into new sectors. With a focus on expanding its ro-ro vessel green shipping business, acquiring Web3 enterprise zCloak, and entering the Artificial Intelligence field, Intercont aims to establish a growth matrix comprising "Green Shipping + Web3 & AI Infrastructure." The company's strategy is built on integrating digital and real economies, seizing global industrial restructuring opportunities, and leveraging its core capabilities for long-term value growth. This move signifies Intercont's positioning for a significant evolution towards strategic cross-domain presence and value transformation in the global market.

data.title: Totaligent (OTCID: TGNT) acquires Aetherium Medical team, IP, and assets through binding LOI. Acquisition aims strategic growth.
data.description: Totaligent, under the OTCID TGNT ticker symbol, recently finalized a Letter of Intent for the acquisition and talent absorption of Aetherium Medical, a prominent healthcare company. This indicates a significant move in the market, with Totaligent aiming to enhance its capabilities through this strategic initiative. Aetherium Medical's expertise and resources are expected to contribute to Totaligent's growth and expansion plans, promising a fruitful collaboration. The details and benefits of this deal are set to unfold as the acquisition progresses.

data.title: Tron Inc. expands TRX treasury to 681.2M tokens, asserting market leadership and long-term conviction in TRON ecosystem.
data.description: Today in Winter Park, Florida, Tron Inc. (Nasdaq: TRON) disclosed its plans to expand its TRON (TRX) treasury, establishing itself as the leading publicly traded TRON (TRX) treasury strategy firm worldwide. This move showcases the company's unwavering confidence in the TRON ecosystem, highlighting their dedication to long-term growth.

data.title: Intchains Group Limited (Nasdaq: ICG) to report Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on Feb 26, 2026.
data.description: Singapore-based Intchains Group Limited, listed on Nasdaq as ICG, is set to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025 on February 26, 2026. The company specializes in altcoin mining products, strategic acquisition and holding of Ethereum-based cryptocurrencies, and operates a Proof-of-Stake cryptocurrency staking platform. This information was shared in a recent announcement by the company.
